brief: US and Iran exchange strikes amid escalating Middle East tensions, and Russia launches a major missile assault on Kyiv. Meanwhile, research highlights the impact of AI on writing and the challenges of human-robot interaction.
news_summary: The US and Iran trade strikes after US soldiers killed in Jordan; Russia batters Kyiv in one of the largest missile assaults. The Tate brothers face extradition from the US to the UK, and a majority of US voters link extreme weather to climate crisis.
papers_summary: Research explores how biographical factors shape second language writing instructors' identities and how ChatGPT affects personal statement revision. A study on urban driving data uses causal analysis to understand traffic jams.

en.brief: US and Iran exchange strikes amid escalating Middle East tensions, and Russia launches a major missile assault on Kyiv. Meanwhile, research highlights the impact of AI on writing and the challenges of human-robot interaction.
en.news_summary: The US and Iran trade strikes after US soldiers killed in Jordan; Russia batters Kyiv in one of the largest missile assaults. The Tate brothers face extradition from the US to the UK, and a majority of US voters link extreme weather to climate crisis.
en.papers_summary: Research explores how biographical factors shape second language writing instructors' identities and how ChatGPT affects personal statement revision. A study on urban driving data uses causal analysis to understand traffic jams.

zh.brief: 今日新闻涵盖双生姐妹矮小体型提供癌症线索、揭阳虐狗案引发全球抗议、K-pop悄然传入朝鲜、中国空调热销欧洲、姆巴佩与梅西的金靴之争，以及首次在宜居带类地行星发现大气层。研究方面暂无重点论文。
zh.news_summary: 多项热点：双生姐妹研究揭示糖尿病与癌症的遗传关联；揭阳虐狗案激发动物保护呼声；朝鲜青少年通过K-pop接触外部文化；中国空调品牌抓住欧洲热浪商机；世界杯决赛前夕姆巴佩领先金靴榜；天文发现为地外生命探索带来希望。

todays_image.caption: The experimental Paresev glider and the US-Iran strikes both involve airborne vehicles that, whether for research or retaliation, carry inherent risks of unforeseen outcomes.
todays_image.title: Paraglider Research Vehicle (Paresev) 1-A, Gemini
